title: Non-domestic National Energy Efficiency Data Framework (ND-NEED), 2025
body: "This report presents statistics on the metered electricity and gas consumption of non-domestic buildings in England and Wales for 2012 to 2023, with analysis by:   building use building size occupying business size   It also presents statistics about the ND-NEED non-domestic building stock in England and Wales, by year of construction and business size.  "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
